tools.name: GitHub Copilot Free
tools.description: AI code completions and chat inside VS Code, JetBrains, and Neovim. 2,000 completions/month on the free tier.

sentiment.summary: 4.7M paid subscribers, 90% of Fortune 100 adoption. Loved for widest IDE support and tight GitHub integration. Coding Agent (issues-to-PRs) is a killer feature. Less agentic than Cursor.

tools.name: Gemini Code Assist
tools.description: Google's AI code completion with 6,000 completions/day and 240 chat requests/day — no credit card needed.

sentiment.summary: 6K completions/day free is incredibly generous. Great for Google ecosystem devs. Less agentic than Copilot or Cursor.

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.description: AI-powered code editor (formerly Codeium) with unlimited autocomplete on the free tier. Supports 70+ languages.

sentiment.summary: Ranked #1 in LogRocket power rankings. Praised for speed and 75% of Cursor's capability at lower price. Acquisition by Cognition raised some concerns about future direction.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-native code editor (VS Code fork) with tab completion, inline edits, and multi-file chat.

sentiment.summary: Devs love the agentic multi-file editing and Composer mode. Complaints center on rising prices ($60-200/mo) and occasional context window issues. Still the go-to for teams shipping fast.

tools.name: Continue
tools.description: Open-source AI autopilot for VS Code and JetBrains. Connect any LLM — local or cloud.

sentiment.summary: Most popular open-source coding extension. Loved for model-agnostic flexibility � use any LLM local or cloud. Sits uniquely between Copilot and Cursor. Less polished UX than paid alternatives.

tools.name: Cline
tools.description: Open-source agentic AI coding assistant in VS Code. Executes multi-step tasks with your approval.

sentiment.summary: 5M installs, praised for deep codebase understanding ('like a senior dev who reads your entire codebase'). But API costs can hit $200/mo with heavy use. Kilo Code fork gaining ground as 'Cline superset'.

tools.name: Aider
tools.description: Terminal-based AI pair programmer with best-in-class git integration and multi-file edits.

sentiment.summary: Gold standard for terminal AI coding. 39K stars, beloved git-first workflow where every edit is a commit. Low API costs ($0.50-2/session). Steep learning curve and terminal-only turns some away.

tools.name: CodeRabbit
tools.description: Automated AI code review on pull requests. Free for open-source projects.

sentiment.summary: Most-installed AI app on GitHub/GitLab with 2M+ repos. Fast at catching common bugs (null checks, secrets, SQL injection). Weak on business logic and architectural reasoning � teams outgrow it for complex codebases.

tools.name: Qodo
tools.description: AI-powered test generation and code quality analysis. Generates meaningful unit tests from your code.

sentiment.summary: Good AI test generation. Meaningful unit tests, not boilerplate. Free tier limited. Pro at $19/mo competes with free alternatives.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.description: Open-source AI coding agent in your terminal with a polished TUI and deep LSP integration.

sentiment.summary: 120K stars, 5M monthly devs. Clean TUI praised as best-in-class for terminal agents. Built in Go, fast and lightweight. Ecosystem still thin and documentation needs work compared to Aider.

tools.name: Gemini CLI
tools.description: Brings Gemini AI directly into your terminal for coding tasks and shell automation. Up to 1,000 requests/day free.

sentiment.summary: 1K requests/day free. Google-backed, open-source. Good for shell automation and quick coding tasks. Growing rapidly.

tools.name: PR-Agent
tools.description: Open-source AI code review tool. Auto-reviews PRs, generates descriptions, and suggests improvements.

sentiment.summary: Excellent open-source PR review. Auto-generates descriptions. Self-hostable. Less polished than CodeRabbit but free and extensible.

tools.name: CodeAnt AI
tools.description: AI code review and code quality platform that catches issues before they reach production.

tools.name: Testsigma
tools.description: Open-source AI test automation for web, mobile, and APIs. Natural language test steps with auto-healing.

sentiment.summary: Natural language test steps with auto-healing. Open-source and capable. Less known than Playwright but impressive for non-coders.

tools.name: Potpie
tools.description: Open-source AI agent for your codebase with pre-built agents for Q&A, testing, debugging, and system design.

sentiment.summary: Pre-built agents for Q&A, testing, debugging. Understands full codebase context. Small community but useful for quick onboarding.

tools.name: Snyk Free
tools.description: AI-powered security scanning for code, dependencies, containers, and IaC. Finds and suggests fixes.

sentiment.summary: Industry standard for dependency scanning. Generous free tier. Pair with Trivy+Semgrep for full free security stack.

tools.name: Mintlify Free
tools.description: AI-powered documentation platform. Auto-generates developer docs and API references from your codebase.

tools.name: Apidog
tools.description: All-in-one API development platform with auto-generated interactive docs from OpenAPI/Postman specs.

tools.name: Amazon Q Developer
tools.description: AI code suggestions, vulnerability scanning, and code transformation. Deep AWS integration. 50 agentic requests/month free.

tools.name: Tabnine Free
tools.description: Privacy-focused AI code completion that runs locally or in the cloud. Supports 30+ languages.

tools.name: AI2sql
tools.description: Converts natural language to SQL queries. Write, optimize, and debug SQL without deep database expertise.

sentiment.summary: Simple NL-to-SQL for beginners. Works for basic queries. Struggles with complex joins. Free tier limited.

tools.name: Google Stitch
tools.description: Generates mobile and web UI from text prompts or images, powered by Gemini. Up to 350 designs/month free.

tools.name: v0 by Vercel
tools.description: Generates React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui components from text prompts or screenshots.

tools.name: Figma First Draft
tools.description: Built into Figma — generates wireframes or high-fidelity designs from a chat prompt on the free plan.

tools.name: Screenshot to Code
tools.description: Open-source tool that converts screenshots/mockups into HTML, Tailwind, React, or Vue code.

tools.name: Leonardo AI Free
tools.description: AI image generation with 150 free tokens/day. Great for concept art, textures, and UI assets.

tools.name: Ideogram Free
tools.description: AI image generation that excels at accurate, readable text in images — great for posters and logos.

tools.name: Recraft Free
tools.description: Generates photorealistic images, vector illustrations, icons, and logo designs from prompts.

tools.name: Khroma
tools.description: Trains on your 50 preferred colors and generates personalized palettes using a neural network. No signup.

tools.name: Fontjoy
tools.description: AI-powered font pairing generator using deep learning. One-click harmonious font combinations.

tools.name: Uizard Free
tools.description: AI-powered prototyping tool that generates UI screens from text prompts, sketches, or screenshots. Free: 2 projects.

tools.name: UX Pilot
tools.description: Generates UI designs from prompts in high-fidelity and wireframe modes. Free tier with limited generations.

tools.name: Banani
tools.description: Prompt-based UI generation with screenshot-to-design conversion and code export.

tools.name: AI4Chat Screenshot to Code
tools.description: Converts screenshots into working code across multiple frameworks. No login required.

tools.name: Codia AI
tools.description: Transforms Figma designs and screenshots into editable code for Flutter, React, HTML/CSS, and Vue.

tools.name: Lovable Free
tools.description: Full-stack AI app builder that generates real source code from text prompts. Free tier: 5 daily credits.

tools.name: Adobe Firefly Free
tools.description: Adobe's generative AI for images, vectors, and text effects. Limited free credits available.

tools.name: Canva Magic Design
tools.description: AI-powered design generation integrated into Canva. 50 free text-to-image uses per account.

tools.name: Coolors
tools.description: Fast palette generator with AI chatbot for color suggestions. Spacebar to randomize, export in many formats.

tools.name: Colormind
tools.description: AI-powered color palette generator that can extract and suggest palettes from images.

tools.name: ColorMagic
tools.description: AI color palette generator from text descriptions (e.g., 'sunset over ocean').

tools.name: Recraft Icons
tools.description: Generates sets of up to six editable SVG icons from text prompts with image-to-vector conversion.

tools.name: SVG AI
tools.description: Converts text descriptions into SVG graphics. Download as SVG, PNG, or React JSX components.

tools.name: AutoDraw

tools.name: Penpot
tools.description: Free, open-source design tool with built-in developer collaboration features and accessibility.

tools.name: Framer AI
tools.description: Generates complete websites from text prompts with real-time design editing and instant publishing.

tools.name: Workik CSS Generator

tools.name: ComfyUI
tools.description: Open-source node-based AI image pipeline. Generate sprites, textures, and concept art locally on your GPU.

tools.name: PixelLab

tools.name: Inworld AI Free

tools.description: Real-time conversational AI for voice-enabled NPCs. Free plugins for Unity and Unreal Engine.

tools.description: Train intelligent agents in Unity with deep reinforcement learning. NPCs, testing, and game balancing.

tools.name: Rosebud AI Free
tools.description: AI game creation platform — describe your game in natural language and get playable code. 2D and 3D.

tools.name: SEELE AI Sprite Generator
tools.description: Creates pixel art, animated sprite sheets, and 2D game assets from text. Compatible with Unity, Godot, GameMaker.

tools.name: Perchance Pixel Art
tools.description: Simple browser-based pixel art generator. No sign-up, no limits, no watermark.

tools.name: God Mode AI
tools.description: AI sprite generator that exports as Spine files compatible with Unity, Unreal, and Godot. Walk/run/combat animations.

tools.name: LoreCraft AI
tools.description: AI dialogue generator with native export for RPG Maker, Unity, Godot, and Unreal. 50 free daily generations.

tools.name: SFX Engine
tools.description: Generates unlimited unique sound effects from text prompts. Designed for games, videos, and podcasts.

tools.name: AI Dungeon
tools.description: GPT-powered adaptive branching narrative engine. Generates real-time interactive stories and game narratives.

tools.name: Unreal ML-Agents

tools.description: Unreal Engine plugin connecting to ComfyUI for automatic AI-powered texturing of scenes and objects.

tools.name: Rosebud AI Assets
tools.description: Generates 2D game assets including sprites, tilesets, pixel art, and character art in any style. Unlimited and free.

tools.description: Procedural 2D level generation with theme-based visualization. Ready-to-use level layouts.

tools.name: Azgaar's Map Generator
tools.description: Generates detailed interactive fantasy world maps with biomes, cultures, and political boundaries.

tools.name: donjon RPG Tools
tools.description: Comprehensive random generators for dungeons, NPC stats, world maps, encounter tables, and loot.

tools.name: Workik Game Maker
tools.description: AI game maker — describe your game concept and it generates playable games. No signup required.

tools.name: Meshy Free

tools.description: Tencent's open-source text/image-to-3D with PBR textures. Runs on as little as 6GB VRAM.

tools.name: BlenderGPT
tools.description: Free Blender addon — describe what you need in natural language and get geometry in your scene.

tools.description: Open-source Blender addon for AI texture generation running locally via Stable Diffusion.

tools.name: Cascadeur Free
tools.description: AI-assisted keyframe animation with physics-based tools. Free for indie and non-commercial use.

tools.name: Mixamo
tools.description: Adobe's automatic character rigging and animation library. Upload a mesh, get a rigged character.

tools.name: Nerfstudio
tools.description: Open-source framework for training and rendering NeRFs and Gaussian Splats. Research-grade quality.

tools.name: TripoSR
tools.description: Open-source model for fast 3D reconstruction from a single image. Under 0.5 seconds on an A100.

tools.name: InstantMesh
tools.description: Generates 3D mesh from a single image via multi-view generation then sparse-view reconstruction.

tools.name: Spline AI Free
tools.description: Browser-based 3D design tool with AI-powered generation of objects, animations, and textures from prompts.

tools.name: 3D AI Studio Free
tools.description: Transforms text or images into 3D assets. Includes AI rigging tool and texture generation.

tools.name: Blender MCP
tools.description: AI-powered 3D modeling in Blender using natural language instructions via Model Context Protocol.

tools.name: StableGen
tools.description: Blender add-on for generative AI texturing with PBR decomposition (albedo, roughness, metallic, normal, height).

tools.name: 3D-Agent
tools.description: Native Blender integration for AI 3D generation with a free tier, purpose-built for Blender workflows.

tools.name: Rokoko Vision
tools.description: AI motion capture from webcam or uploaded video. Single-camera mode is free.

tools.name: Plask Motion
tools.description: AI-powered video-to-3D-animation tool. Browser-based mocap from video uploads.

tools.name: DeepMotion
tools.description: AI motion capture from video with body, face, and hand tracking. Converts video to 3D animation.

tools.name: AccuRIG
tools.description: Free tool for quick and efficient AI rigging of 3D characters.

tools.name: Polycam Free
tools.description: 3D scanning from phone photos with AI mesh cleanup and texture generation. Exports to 12+ formats.

tools.name: KIRI Engine
tools.description: Photo-based 3D scanning with AI-powered PBR material generation and automatic rigging.

tools.name: Meshroom

tools.name: gsplat
tools.description: CUDA-accelerated Gaussian splatting library with 4x lower memory than original. Integrates NVIDIA 3DGUT.

tools.name: OpenSplat
tools.description: Production-grade Gaussian splatting for Windows, Mac, Linux with CPU fallback.

tools.name: Material Maker
tools.description: Procedural material authoring tool (node-based graph). Exports for Godot, Unity, and Unreal.

tools.name: MeshLab
tools.description: Open-source mesh processing — repair, simplification, point cloud to mesh conversion, and analysis.

tools.name: CloudCompare
tools.description: 3D point cloud and mesh processing. Handles 120M+ points. Comparison, registration, segmentation.

tools.name: CADScribe
tools.description: Generates 3D CAD components from text descriptions, focused on technical/mechanical parts.

tools.name: ComfyUI-3D-Pack
tools.description: Node suite for ComfyUI enabling 3D processing with Gaussian Splatting, NeRF, mesh and UV workflows.

tools.name: Suno Free
tools.description: Full song generation — vocals and instruments — from text prompts. Limited daily credits on free tier.

tools.name: ElevenLabs Free
tools.description: Text-to-sound-effect and text-to-speech generation. 10,000 characters/month free.

tools.name: Beatoven.ai

tools.name: CapCut

tools.name: DaVinci Resolve
tools.description: Professional-grade video editor with color grading, VFX, and audio post. Free version, no watermarks.

tools.name: Otter.ai Free
tools.description: Real-time meeting transcription with AI summaries and action items. 300 min/month free.

tools.name: OpenShot
tools.description: Fully free open-source video editor. No watermarks, no limitations, cross-platform.

tools.name: Clipchamp
tools.description: Microsoft's built-in video editor with AI auto-captions and templates. Free in Windows 11.

tools.name: OpenMusic AI
tools.description: Unlimited royalty-free AI music from text prompts. No account needed.

tools.name: AIVA Free
tools.description: AI composer for emotional soundtrack creation. Free tier available.

tools.name: Fireflies.ai Free
tools.description: AI meeting assistant with unlimited transcription on the free tier.

tools.name: Udio Free
tools.description: AI music generation with high-quality audio from text descriptions. Free tier available.

tools.name: Perplexity AI Free
tools.description: Conversational AI search engine with cited sources. 5 Pro searches/day free.

sentiment.summary: Go-to AI search engine. Citations genuinely useful. Free tier generous. Some concerns about source accuracy.

tools.name: Google NotebookLM
tools.description: Upload docs, papers, or videos and ask questions. Generates audio overviews. Completely free.

tools.name: Ollama
tools.description: Run LLMs locally with one command — Llama, Mistral, Gemma, and more. No cloud, full privacy.

sentiment.summary: Developer favorite for local LLMs. One command, OpenAI-compatible API. 55 tok/s on Llama 3.1 8B. Performance diffs vs LM Studio <5%.

tools.name: HuggingChat
tools.description: Open-source AI chat running Llama, Mistral, and other models on Hugging Face infrastructure. Fully free.

sentiment.summary: Free AI chat with top open-source models. No login needed. Great for trying models before downloading. Limited customization.

tools.name: Gamma Free
tools.description: AI-generated presentations, documents, and web pages from prompts. Limited free credits.

tools.name: n8n
tools.description: Open-source workflow automation with AI integration. Self-hostable Zapier alternative.

sentiment.summary: Only tool combining AI + general automation in one flow. 400+ integrations. Self-hostable. Learning curve but very powerful.

tools.name: Grammarly Free
tools.description: Real-time grammar, spelling, tone, and style correction with AI suggestions. Generous free tier.

tools.name: LM Studio
tools.description: Desktop app to download and run local LLMs with a GUI. No coding needed, fully offline.

sentiment.summary: Best GUI for running local LLMs. Built-in model browser, side-by-side comparison. Excellent Apple Silicon optimization.

tools.name: ChatGPT Free
tools.description: OpenAI's general-purpose AI assistant for writing, research, coding. GPT-4o limited free access.

tools.name: Google Gemini Free
tools.description: Multimodal AI assistant with web search, image understanding, and Gemini Live voice.

tools.name: Claude Free
tools.description: Anthropic's AI assistant strong at reasoning, coding, and long-form writing. Free tier available.

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot
tools.description: AI assistant integrated with Bing search, image generation, and Microsoft 365.

tools.name: Brave Search
tools.description: Privacy-focused AI search with answer summaries, no tracking.

tools.name: Consensus
tools.description: Searches peer-reviewed papers and synthesizes evidence-based answers from scientific literature.

tools.name: Elicit
tools.description: Academic research assistant. Searches 125M+ papers with AI analysis and extraction.

tools.name: Semantic Scholar
tools.description: AI-enhanced academic paper discovery with summaries and citation analysis. Completely free.

tools.name: Google Looker Studio
tools.description: Free interactive dashboards integrating with Google Sheets, Analytics, and BigQuery.

tools.name: Orange
tools.description: Open-source drag-and-drop data visualization and machine learning tool.

tools.name: Hugging Face
tools.description: Largest open-source AI model hub — 700K+ models, datasets, and Spaces for deploying models.

tools.name: Jan
tools.description: Open-source ChatGPT alternative that runs entirely offline on your machine.

sentiment.summary: Privacy-first with full open-source licensing. Extension ecosystem, unified local+cloud interface. Smaller community than Ollama.

tools.name: Open WebUI
tools.description: Self-hosted ChatGPT-like UI for local models. Works with Ollama.

sentiment.summary: Self-hosted ChatGPT UI that works with Ollama. Clean interface, active development. The default frontend for local LLM setups.

tools.name: GPT4All
tools.description: Run LLMs locally on consumer hardware. No internet needed.

sentiment.summary: Run LLMs on consumer hardware offline. Simple installer. Less flexible than Ollama for developers but easier for non-technical users.

tools.name: Activepieces
tools.description: MIT-licensed open-source Zapier alternative with 450+ integrations. Self-hostable.

sentiment.summary: MIT-licensed Zapier alt. 450+ integrations, easy to self-host. Growing fast. Less mature than n8n but simpler.

tools.name: Windmill
tools.description: Open-source platform for scripts, workflows, and internal tools.

tools.name: Notion AI Free
tools.description: AI writing, summarizing, and brainstorming built into the Notion workspace. Limited free AI usage.

tools.name: QuillBot

sentiment.summary: Good for quick copywriting. Workflow automation useful. Free tier limited. Quality varies, best for short-form.

sentiment.summary: Decent SEO content writer. Competitive pricing. Output quality inconsistent, needs human editing for publication.

tools.name: Kling 3.0
tools.description: Multi-shot video sequences with subject consistency across camera angles, plus multi-character native audio.

tools.name: Claude 5
tools.description: Expected next-gen model with intelligent tool chaining, multi-system coordination, and long-term project context.

tools.name: GPT-5.3-Codex
tools.description: Most capable agentic coding model from OpenAI — 25% faster with frontier coding and reasoning performance.

tools.name: Gemini 3.1 Deep Think
tools.description: Leading scores on 13 of 16 benchmarks. Deep Think for extended reasoning. Expanding to Search and NotebookLM.

tools.name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3
tools.description: Open reasoning models (30B/100B/500B) optimized for agentic AI with 4x higher token throughput and 1M token context.

tools.name: Meta Llama 4
tools.description: Open-source model with agentic capabilities — browse web, execute code, use APIs autonomously.

tools.name: DeepSeek V4
tools.description: Next generation of the open-source challenger model that disrupted the AI landscape.

tools.name: Apple Siri (Reimagined)
tools.description: Context-aware AI assistant with on-screen awareness and seamless cross-app integration on Apple devices.

tools.name: ForgeFoley
tools.description: Professional-grade AI foley (sound effect) generation for filmmakers and post-production.

tools.name: Goose
tools.description: Open-source AI agent by Block (Square) that goes beyond code suggestions � installs, executes, edits, and tests with any LLM. Supports MCP integrations.

sentiment.summary: 26K+ stars, strong community buzz as free Claude Code alternative. Works offline, fully local. Block's security team found and fixed prompt injection vulns in early 2026. Some rough edges but rapidly improving.

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.description: Viral open-source personal AI assistant (210K+ GitHub stars) that runs locally and connects to 50+ integrations including WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, and Telegram.

sentiment.summary: 210K+ stars, fastest growing OSS ever. Personal AI on your devices with 50+ integrations. Name-change drama but product is solid.

tools.name: Tabby
tools.description: Self-hosted open-source AI coding assistant. A privacy-first alternative to GitHub Copilot supporting CodeLlama, StarCoder, and consumer GPUs.

sentiment.summary: Best option for air-gapped/self-hosted environments. Complete data control, code never leaves your infra. But requires decent hardware (16GB+ RAM, GPU), DevOps skills to set up, and quality depends heavily on model choice.

tools.name: CodeGeeX
tools.description: Open-source 13B-parameter AI coding assistant. Code generation, translation, and completion across 20+ languages. Free VS Code and JetBrains extensions.

sentiment.summary: 13B param open-source model. Good multilingual code gen and translation. Free extensions. Less capable than commercial tools.

tools.name: Open SWE
tools.description: Open-source async coding agent by LangChain. Researches codebases, plans, writes code, runs tests, and opens PRs autonomously. Integrates with Slack, Linear, and GitHub.

sentiment.summary: LangChain async coding agent. Plans, codes, tests, opens PRs. Slack/Linear integration. New but MIT licensed.

tools.name: SWE-agent
tools.description: Open-source agent that takes a GitHub issue and autonomously fixes it. State of the art on SWE-bench. Built by Princeton and Stanford researchers.

sentiment.summary: State of the art on SWE-bench. Princeton/Stanford pedigree. Mini-SWE-agent is 100 lines and scores 74%.

tools.name: Dify
tools.description: Open-source platform for building LLM apps with visual workflow builder, RAG pipelines, agent capabilities, and 50+ built-in tools. 100K+ GitHub stars.

sentiment.summary: 100K+ stars. Best visual AI workflow builder for non-devs. Self-hostable. Mature plugin architecture. The WordPress of AI apps.

tools.name: Langflow
tools.description: Open-source low-code builder for AI agents and RAG apps. Drag-and-drop visual interface, supports all major LLMs and vector databases.

sentiment.summary: Great drag-and-drop agent builder for devs. Python-based, model-agnostic. Less polished than Dify for non-technical users.

tools.name: K8sGPT
tools.description: Open-source CNCF sandbox project that scans Kubernetes clusters, diagnoses issues in plain English, and suggests fixes. Supports multiple AI providers.

sentiment.summary: CNCF sandbox project. Plain English K8s diagnostics that work. Niche but beloved by DevOps teams.

tools.name: E2B
tools.description: Open-source secure sandboxes for running AI-generated code in the cloud. Firecracker microVMs, up to 24h sessions. Used by 88% of Fortune 100.

sentiment.summary: Used by 88% of Fortune 100. Firecracker microVMs are rock solid. Essential infrastructure for AI agents.

tools.name: Dataline
tools.description: Open-source AI data analysis tool. Chat with your data � connects to Postgres, MySQL, Snowflake, SQLite, CSV. Privacy-focused, runs locally.

sentiment.summary: Privacy-focused local data analysis. Connects to everything. Small but growing. Perfect for sensitive data.

tools.name: Upscayl
tools.description: Free and open-source AI image upscaler for Linux, macOS, and Windows. Enhance images up to 16x resolution using ncnn and Vulkan GPU acceleration.

sentiment.summary: Best free image upscaler for desktop. One-click 16x upscaling. Needs Vulkan GPU. Clean UI, just works.

tools.name: Mautic
tools.description: World's largest open-source marketing automation platform. Email campaigns, lead scoring, multi-channel marketing, CRM integrations, and GDPR compliance.

sentiment.summary: Best open-source marketing automation. Dramatically cheaper than Mailchimp at scale. Requires PHP/MySQL knowledge and server maintenance.

tools.name: Botpress
tools.description: Open-source platform for building GPT/LLM-powered chatbots and AI agents. Visual flow editor, NLU, and extensive SDK for integrations.

sentiment.summary: Powerful chatbot builder with visual flow editor. v12 OSS is solid. Cloud version more polished but less open. Complex for simple bots.

tools.name: Rasa
tools.description: Open-source conversational AI framework for building chatbots and voice assistants. Supports 100+ languages with LLM-augmented CALM engine.

sentiment.summary: Best OSS conversational AI. CALM engine with LLM is impressive. Shift to Rasa Pro upset community. Steep learning curve.

tools.name: Zen-AI-Pentest
tools.description: Open-source AI-powered penetration testing framework. Autonomous agents run reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, and exploitation using Nmap and Metasploit.

sentiment.summary: New AI pentesting framework. Early stage, limited feedback. Interesting AI-orchestrated security testing concept.

tools.name: Superpowers
tools.description: Agentic skills framework and software development methodology. Shell-based, 92K+ GitHub stars. Compose AI agent behaviors without heavy Python boilerplate.

sentiment.summary: 92K stars, Shell-based agent framework. Compose agent behaviors without Python. Viral growth in early 2026.

tools.name: OpenBB
tools.description: Open-source financial data platform for analysts, quants, and AI agents. 600+ commands covering equity, options, crypto, forex, macro, and more.

sentiment.summary: 25K+ stars, evolved into polished Financial Operating System. Used by hedge funds. SOC 2 certified. The open-source Bloomberg challenger.

tools.name: FinRL
tools.description: Open-source deep reinforcement learning framework for automated trading. Supports stocks, crypto, forex, and options with backtesting.

sentiment.summary: Leading open-source RL trading framework. Academic pedigree (NeurIPS). Great for research/backtesting. Not plug-and-play for live trading.

tools.name: FinRobot
tools.description: Open-source AI agent platform for finance � investment research automation, algorithmic trading, and risk assessment using LLMs.

sentiment.summary: AI agent platform for finance. Research-oriented, too niche for broad community sentiment yet.

tools.name: Freqtrade
tools.description: Open-source crypto trading bot with ML optimization via FreqAI. Backtesting, strategy development, and live trading on Binance, Kraken, OKX, and more.

sentiment.summary: Most popular open-source crypto bot (25K+ stars). Excellent FreqAI ML module, massive community since 2017. Can be complex to configure.

tools.name: OctoBot
tools.description: Open-source crypto trading bot with AI, Grid, and DCA strategies. Simple UI, supports 15+ exchanges including Binance and Hyperliquid.

sentiment.summary: 20K+ users, loved for simple UI and ChatGPT strategy integration. Great for DCA/Grid beginners. Less flexible than Freqtrade for power users.

tools.name: Jesse
tools.description: Advanced open-source crypto trading bot in Python. Strategy backtesting, optimization, and live trading with clean API.

sentiment.summary: Excellent developer experience and backtesting. GPT strategy assistant. Smaller community, requires Python knowledge.

tools.name: OpenTrader
tools.description: Open-source crypto trading bot with DCA and Grid strategies. Clean UI for managing bots across exchanges.

sentiment.summary: Clean UI for DCA/Grid trading. Newer project with growing community. Limited reviews available.

tools.name: Superalgos
tools.description: Open-source visual trading bot builder with charting, data-mining, backtesting, paper trading, and multi-server deployments.

sentiment.summary: Ambitious visual trading bot builder. Powerful but overwhelming interface. Data-mining is impressive. Steep learning curve.

tools.name: AI-Trader
tools.description: Open-source AI trading agent supporting US stocks, crypto, forex, options, futures, and Polymarket. Live trading benchmark.

sentiment.summary: Multi-market AI trading agent from HKU research. Academic benchmark, not production-ready for retail.

tools.name: MobSF
tools.description: Open-source automated mobile app security testing (SAST + DAST). Scans APK, IPA, APPX � Java, Kotlin, Swift, Objective-C.

sentiment.summary: Go-to open-source mobile security tool. Scans Android+iOS automatically. Active community. UI functional but dated.

tools.name: ZAP (Checkmarx)
tools.description: Most widely used open-source DAST tool. Automated vulnerability scanning, manual pentesting, and REST API testing.

sentiment.summary: Most used open-source DAST tool globally. Excellent for web app pentesting and API testing. Now maintained by Checkmarx.

tools.name: Semgrep
tools.description: Open-source static analysis (SAST) that finds bugs and enforces coding standards. Supports 30+ languages with custom rules.

sentiment.summary: Blazing fast SAST (10s median CI scans), 20K+ rules, AI cuts false positives by 98%. Devs love custom rules. Free for 10 contributors.

tools.name: Trivy
tools.description: Open-source vulnerability scanner for containers, filesystems, git repos, and Kubernetes. By Aqua Security.

sentiment.summary: Best free container/IaC scanner. Zero friction, excellent breadth. No source code SAST - pair with Semgrep for full coverage.

tools.name: BlacksmithAI
tools.description: Open-source AI penetration testing framework using multi-agent orchestration across security assessment lifecycle stages.

sentiment.summary: Multi-agent AI pentesting framework. Too new for meaningful sentiment. Promising architecture.

tools.name: SerpBear
tools.description: Open-source self-hosted Google keyword rank tracker. Unlimited keywords, email alerts, Search Console integration, and built-in API.

sentiment.summary: Saves $200-600/yr vs paid rank trackers. Unlimited keywords, GSC integration. Self-hosting ~$5-10/mo. Basic but functional UX.

tools.name: Listmonk
tools.description: Open-source self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager. High-performance Go backend, handles millions of subscribers.

sentiment.summary: Lightning fast Go backend, handles millions of subscribers. Dead simple to self-host. No fancy editor - you write HTML templates.

tools.name: Odoo Email Marketing
tools.description: Open-source marketing automation with email campaigns, lead management, A/B testing, and CRM integration. Part of the Odoo ERP suite.

sentiment.summary: Powerful as part of full Odoo ERP. Overkill for just email marketing. Community edition free but limited vs Enterprise.

tools.name: Metabase
tools.description: Open-source BI platform with AI assistant (Metabot). Build dashboards, write queries in natural language, embed analytics anywhere.

sentiment.summary: Deploy in an hour, non-technical users love it. Metabot AI assistant genuinely useful. Go-to BI for non-technical teams.

tools.name: Apache Superset
tools.description: Open-source data exploration and visualization platform. 40+ chart types, SQL IDE, Python ML model integration.

sentiment.summary: What you graduate to from Metabase. SQL-first, 40+ charts, async queries. Ideal for dbt/Trino stacks. Steeper learning curve.

tools.name: Data Formulator
tools.description: Microsoft's open-source AI-powered data visualization tool. 30+ chart types, natural language queries, semantic chart engine.

sentiment.summary: Microsoft sleeper hit. 30+ chart types with semantic engine. Still alpha but promising. March 2026 update added maps and candlestick.

tools.name: Wren AI
tools.description: Open-source generative BI tool. Ask questions in natural language, get SQL queries, charts, and analytical visuals.

sentiment.summary: Ask in plain English, get SQL + charts. Great concept, growing community. Complex queries can be hit or miss.

tools.name: DB-GPT
tools.description: Open-source agentic AI data assistant. Chat with databases, build data apps, and automate analytics workflows.

sentiment.summary: Chat with any database using AI agents. Build data apps without code. Active Chinese dev community, English docs improving.

tools.name: Trae IDE
tools.description: ByteDance's free AI-powered IDE with Builder Mode for autonomous project scaffolding, multimodal input, and access to Claude 4 and GPT-4o. Over 6 million users in its first year.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.description: Fully open-source terminal AI coding agent that works with any AI provider including Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, Gemini, or local models.

tools.name: Google Antigravity
tools.description: Google's agent-first AI development platform with Editor View for hands-on coding and Manager Surface for deploying autonomous agents. Built around Gemini 3.

tools.description: AI-powered spatial design workspace for interior designers and architects, generating photorealistic renders in under 60 seconds.

tools.name: Higgsfield
tools.description: AI Cinema Studio aggregating 15+ video models (Kling, Veo, Sora, WAN) in one workspace with virtual camera controls and professional post-production.

tools.name: ACE-Step
tools.description: Open-source music generation model that generates full songs in under 2 seconds, supporting 50+ languages and LoRA fine-tuning. MIT licensed.

tools.name: Soundverse
tools.description: AI music generator trusted by 3M+ creators producing fully-produced tracks with studio-grade vocals from text prompts or hummed melodies.

tools.name: Sora 2
tools.description: OpenAI's advanced video generation model with multi-shot generation, audio support, improved character consistency, and extended duration videos.

tools.name: MiniMax Music
tools.description: AI music generation model from MiniMax producing high-quality full songs with vocals, recognized alongside Suno and Udio as top-tier.

tools.name: World Labs
tools.description: Fei-Fei Li's spatial intelligence lab. Generates explorable 3D worlds from text, images, or video using the Marble world model.

tools.name: TRELLIS
tools.description: Microsoft Research's 4B-param 3D asset generator (CVPR'25 Spotlight). Creates high-fidelity meshes, radiance fields, and 3D Gaussians in ~3 seconds.

tools.name: Luma Genie
tools.description: Luma AI's text-to-3D foundation model. Generates detailed 3D models with quad meshes and PBR materials in under 10 seconds.

tools.name: Masterpiece X
tools.description: AI co-pilot for 3D scene creation. Generates and animates 3D models from text, exports OBJ/FBX/GLB for Unity and Unreal.

tools.name: NVIDIA Cosmos
tools.description: World foundation model platform for physical AI. Generates physics-based videos up to 30s for robotics simulation and autonomous driving.

tools.name: Luma Ray 3
tools.description: First video model with visual reasoning. Native 1080p, 4x faster, HDR 16-bit EXR output, keyframe control, and character consistency.

tools.name: Hunyuan Video
tools.description: Tencent's open-source 8.3B-param video model that runs on consumer GPUs. Includes image-to-video, avatar, and custom variants.

tools.name: Midjourney Video
tools.description: Midjourney's first video model. Image-to-video with manual and automatic animation controls, low/high motion settings.

tools.name: GPT Image 1.5
tools.description: OpenAI's autoregressive image model (successor to DALL-E). 4x faster, 20% cheaper API, image-to-image transforms, and viral Ghibli-style capability.

tools.name: Google Imagen 4
tools.description: Google's latest image model with best-in-class text rendering accuracy and 3-5 second generation via the Flash variant.

tools.name: Grok Imagine
tools.description: xAI's image and video generation API. Text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing at $0.05/second with 10s 720p clips.

tools.name: JetBrains Junie
tools.description: AI coding agent on the IntelliJ Platform. Takes whole tasks in natural language, plans, writes code, and iterates with MCP support.

tools.name: Wondera
tools.description: Conversational AI music platform ranked #1 in Meta benchmarks. Voice cloning, 10+ instrument stem separation, 48kHz studio audio, and DAW plugin.

tools.name: Google Lyria 3
tools.description: DeepMind's music model generating full 3-minute songs with structure awareness, tempo conditioning, time-aligned lyrics, and image-to-music.

tools.name: Gemini Deep Research
tools.description: Google's agent on Gemini 3 Pro for autonomous long-running research synthesis. Leads DeepResearch Bench with available Interactions API.

tools.name: OpenAI Deep Research
tools.description: Autonomous research agent in ChatGPT that browses, reads, and synthesizes web information into comprehensive research reports.

tools.name: NVIDIA Isaac
tools.description: Full-stack robotics platform — Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, GR00T foundation model for humanoid reasoning, and Newton Physics Engine.

tools.name: Skild AI
tools.description: Unified robotics foundation model controlling any robot form factor — quadrupeds, humanoids, arms, mobile manipulators. $1.4B raised.

tools.name: Figure AI
tools.description: Humanoid robots (Figure 01-03) with Helix vision-language-action model controlling multiple robots simultaneously. Valued at $39B.

tools.name: 1X NEO
tools.description: Consumer humanoid robot using the 1X World Model for autonomous chores, conversations, and task learning. Ships 2026.

tools.name: AlphaFold 3
tools.description: Predicts structures of proteins, DNA, RNA, ligands, and their interactions using diffusion architecture. Expanded to full biomolecular complexes.

tools.name: Boltz-2
tools.description: Open-source model predicting protein structure and binding affinity in 20 seconds on a single GPU. Drops prediction cost from ~$100 to cents.

tools.name: Google AI Co-Scientist
tools.description: Multi-agent system on Gemini 2.0 that generates hypotheses, designs experiments, and drafts research proposals autonomously.

tools.name: GenCast
tools.description: DeepMind's diffusion-based weather model delivering 15-day ensemble forecasts in ~8 minutes, outperforming ECMWF in 97%+ of tests.

tools.name: Microsoft Aurora
tools.description: AI weather model outperforming ECMWF in 90%+ of tests. 15-20% more accurate than top traditional models for hurricane prediction.

tools.name: Groq Cloud
tools.description: Ultra-fast inference on custom LPU chips. Llama 70B at 300 tok/sec (10x H100). Free tier with OpenAI-compatible API.

tools.name: Cerebras Inference
tools.description: Wafer-scale processor inference cloud. 1,000+ tok/sec for Llama 405B. Free tier (24M tokens/day) with OpenAI-compatible API.

tools.name: Together AI
tools.description: AI-native cloud for 200+ open-source models. Serverless inference, dedicated endpoints, batch processing with 50% discount.

tools.name: Fireworks AI
tools.description: Production inference platform optimized for compound AI systems. Sub-100ms latency, function calling, and structured JSON output at scale.

tools.name: Replicate
tools.description: Run open-source ML models in the cloud with a single API call. Hosts thousands of models including Flux, Llama, and Whisper.

tools.name: Modal
tools.description: Serverless cloud for AI/ML. Run GPU workloads with zero infrastructure — just write Python. Popular for fine-tuning, batch inference, and pipelines.

tools.name: Unitree Go2
tools.description: AI-powered quadruped robot with lidar, depth cameras, and GPT integration. Used for research, patrol, and companion robotics.

tools.name: Boston Dynamics Spot
tools.description: Industry-leading quadruped robot for inspection, data collection, and hazardous environment navigation with AI-powered autonomy.

tools.name: Isomorphic Labs
tools.description: Google DeepMind spin-off's drug discovery engine outperforming AlphaFold 3 on binding affinity prediction. Described as 'AlphaFold 4' by researchers.
